Package jline.lang.layered

Class LayeredNetwork

java.lang.Object
jline.lang.Model
jline.lang.Ensemble
jline.lang.layered.LayeredNetwork
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class LayeredNetwork extends Ensemble
A layered queueing network model
